title: Down 23% In Last Month, Booking Holdings Stock Poised For Gains?
text: After a 23% fall over the last month, at the current price of around $2100 per share, we believe Booking Holdings stock could see a rebound. BKNG stock has declined from $2635 to $2100 in the last month, underperforming the broader indices, with the S&P falling 5% over the same period.
